solutions.name: Enterprise Connect
solutions.description: Full-stack AI integration for large organizations. Deploy Heady™ agents across your entire enterprise — from customer service automation to internal knowledge management, compliance monitoring, and executive intelligence briefings.
solutions.audience: Enterprise organizations with 500+ employees and complex AI integration requirements

solutions.name: Developer Partner
solutions.description: For development agencies and independent developers building AI-powered products on the Heady™ platform. Access production APIs, co-development support, sandbox environments, and revenue-sharing arrangements.
solutions.audience: Software development agencies, freelance developers, and technical consultancies building on Heady™
features: Production API access at partner rates

solutions.name: Agency Reseller
solutions.description: White-label the full Heady™ product suite and resell AI capabilities to your clients under your own brand. Includes complete brand customization, client management dashboard, and margin-based pricing.
solutions.audience: Marketing agencies, consulting firms, and technology resellers serving business clients

solutions.name: Custom Integration
solutions.description: Bespoke integration development for organizations with unique systems, legacy infrastructure, or specialized industry requirements. The HeadyConnection team works directly with your team to design, build, and maintain tailored AI solutions.
solutions.audience: Organizations with specialized or legacy systems requiring custom AI integration architecture
